title: Path To Grass
description: Turn path blocks into grass blocks with a shovel.
body:
# Path To Grass

This mod lets you turn a path block into a grass block by right clicking it with a shovel.
Complete with sound, 1 damage to your shovel for each block changed, and server support (version 2+)! Report any issues on the github repo. 

# Example

![Showcasing mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e231df4513a7689c5f2298f10f6da4936a7ad581.gif)

## Server
You only need this on the server, players do not need to install the mod.
